title: delissea occultans
intro: Delissea occultans, also known as the Hawaiian heather, is a flowering plant species native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The Delissea occultans plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Delissea occultans can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorants.
